final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining the definitions of and relationships among AI-related concepts.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn illustration aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include each concept as a distinct visual node with connecting lines/arrows showing relationships, definitions embedded as short annotation text beside each node
Subject: must include all 7 concepts as labeled nodes with definitions and relationship connectors:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: needs a light, approachable background suitable for an educational infographic — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a friendly, approachable, easy-to-understand atmosphere — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a clear, readable direction with visual contrast between nodes, connectors, and background — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn / sketchbook surface feel — exact paper texture and line weight are yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 7 concept labels verbatim: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concepts; relationship arrows/connectors between concepts must be clearly visible; each concept must have a short definition annotation; layout must be readable as a single infographic panel
Avoid: overly dense or cluttered layout; purely text-only presentation without visual elements
